description: Use structured verifier evidence, not UI preview or successful rendering alone, as the final readiness decision for a case or dataset sample.
physical_assumptions: A video can look plausible while violating physical causality.
Verifier decisions must be based on trajectory, contact events, render pass contracts, and asset binding evidence.
Every failure should map to a stable failure type and repair suggestion.
verifier_rules: Physics invariant status is pass, fail, or warning.
Render and signal readiness are separate from physics readiness.
Failure reports include first_failure, evidence, and repair_suggestions.
Expected negative cases are counted separately from runtime/preflight failures.
repair_suggestions: Repair the earliest failed layer before changing downstream rendering.
Add a negative regression case for each new verifier rule.
Do not promote samples to datasets unless verifier and render sync gates pass.
